system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      blockMeshDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    // Front face (z = 0)
    ( -1   -1    0 )   // 0
    (  3   -1    0 )   // 1
    (  3    1    0 )   // 2
    ( -1    1    0 )   // 3

    // Back face (z = 0.1)
    ( -1   -1    0.1 ) // 4
    (  3   -1    0.1 ) // 5
    (  3    1    0.1 ) // 6
    ( -1    1    0.1 ) // 7
);

blocks
(
    hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) (120 60 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 4 7 3)
        );
    }
    outlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (1 2 6 5)
        );
    }
    top
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (3 7 6 2)
        );
    }
    bottom
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (0 1 5 4)
        );
    }
    frontAndBack
    {
        type empty;
        faces
        (
            (0 3 2 1)
            (4 5 6 7)
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     pimpleFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.5;

deltaT          0.0025;

writeControl    runTime;

writeInterval   0.05;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}


// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
    }

    "(U|h|e|k|epsilon)"
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    "(U|h|e|k|epsilon)Final"
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors    2;
    nCorrectors         1;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";

}

viscosityModel  constant;

nu              1e-03;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 1 -1 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform (0 0 0);

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (1.5 0 0);
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    top
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    cylinder
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;

}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 2 -2 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 0;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    top
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    cylinder
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;

laminar
{
    laminarModel    generalisedNewtonian;

    generalizedNewtonianCoeffs
    {
        CrossPowerLawCoeffs
        {
            nuInf   10;
            m       0.4;
            n       3;
        }
    }
}')]</foamfiles>
<error_logs>[{'file': 'log.pimpleFoam', 'error_content': 'ERROR: 
keyword viscosityModel is undefined in dictionary "/pscratch/sd/p/peijingx/troubleshoot/benchmark_grouping_C_Cmodels/runs/Cylinder/2/constant/momentumTransport/laminar"

file: /pscratch/sd/p/peijingx/troubleshoot/benchmark_grouping_C_Cmodels/runs/Cylinder/2/constant/momentumTransport/laminar from line 13 to line 21.

    From function const Foam::entry& Foam::dictionary::lookupEntry(const Foam::word&, bool, bool) const
    in file db/dictionary/dictionary.C at line 831.

FOAM exiting'}]</error_logs>
<reviewer_analysis># Error Diagnosis and Resolution

## Error Analysis

The error message is:

```
keyword viscosityModel is undefined in dictionary ".../constant/momentumTransport/laminar"
```

This tells us that when the `generalisedNewtonian` laminar model is selected, the solver expects a `viscosityModel` keyword to be present within the `laminar` sub-dictionary (specifically within the `generalisedNewtonian` subsection).

Looking at the current `momentumTransport` file, the structure is:

```
laminar
{
    laminarModel    generalisedNewtonian;

    generalizedNewtonianCoeffs
    {
        CrossPowerLawCoeffs
        {
            nuInf   10;
            m       0.4;
            n       3;
        }
    }
}
```

The `generalisedNewtonian` model internally requires a `viscosityModel` entry. In newer versions of OpenFOAM, the CrossPowerLaw model itself acts as the viscosity model, and the coefficients are accessed differently.

## Proposed Fix

### Modify `constant/momentumTransport`:

Add the `viscosityModel` entry directly inside the `laminar` sub-dictionary, setting it to `CrossPowerLaw`. The coefficients should be placed at the same level as `nuInf`, `m`, `n` (not nested inside `CrossPowerLawCoeffs`). The file should look like:

```
FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;

laminar
{
    laminarModel    generalisedNewtonian;

    viscosityModel  CrossPowerLaw;

    CrossPowerLawCoeffs
    {
        nuInf   10;
        m       0.4;
        n       3;
    }
}
```

Key changes:
1. Add `viscosityModel CrossPowerLaw;` inside the `laminar` sub-dictionary.
2. Move `nuInf`, `m`, `n` entries out of the nested `CrossPowerLawCoeffs` block and place them directly under `laminar` (same level as `viscosityModel`), since the CrossPowerLaw model reads these keywords directly.

This follows the pattern used in the offsetCylinder tutorial case, where the CrossPowerLaw coefficients are specified at the appropriate level for the CrossPowerLaw viscosity model to access them.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'constant/momentumTransport', 'changes': 'Add viscosityModel CrossPowerLaw inside the laminar sub-dictionary, placing it alongside laminarModel; Move nuInf, m, n entries out of the nested CrossPowerLawCoeffs block so they are direct children of laminar'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>do a laminar offsetcylinder simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm with a generalized Newtonian model and Cross-Power-Law viscosity for momentum transport, characterized by specific parameters nuInf=10, m=0.4, n=3. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 1.5m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls, including the cylinder surface. Use timestep of 0.0025 and output every 0.05. Finaltime is 0.5. use constant viscosity model with nu value of 1e-03 in physical properties.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
